From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1969 studio album by Billy Butler

| --- | --- |

| Recorded | September 22, 1969 |
| Studio | [Van Gelder Studio](/wiki/Van_Gelder_Studio "Van Gelder Studio"), Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey |

"This Is Billy Butler!")* (1968) | ***Guitar Soul!*** (1969) | *[Yesterday, Today & Tomorrow](/wiki/Yesterday,_Today_%26_Tomorrow_(Billy_Butler_album) "Yesterday, Today & Tomorrow (Billy Butler album)")* (1970) | | |

***Guitar Soul!*** is the second album by guitarist [Billy Butler](/wiki/Billy_Butler_(guitarist) "Billy Butler (guitarist)") which was recorded in 1969 and released on the [Prestige](/wiki/Prestige_Records "Prestige Records") label.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Reception

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Guitar_Soul!&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Reception")]

Professional ratings

| Review scores | |
| --- | --- |
| Source | Rating |
| [Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") | StarStarStarStar[[2]](#cite_note-Allmusic-2) |

Alex Henderson of [Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") calls the album a "creative triumph" and states "*Guitar Soul* reflects Butler's diversity".[[2]](#cite_note-Allmusic-2)

## Track listing

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Guitar_Soul!&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Track listing")]

1. "Blow for the Crossing" (Charles Black, Billy Butler) - 9:27
2. "Golden Earrings" ([Ray Evans](/wiki/Ray_Evans "Ray Evans"), [Jay Livingston](/wiki/Jay_Livingston "Jay Livingston"), [Victor Young](/wiki/Victor_Young "Victor Young")) - 4:04
3. "The Thumb" ([Wes Montgomery](/wiki/Wes_Montgomery "Wes Montgomery")) - 4:16
4. "Honky Tonk" (Billy Butler, [Bill Doggett](/wiki/Bill_Doggett "Bill Doggett"), Clifford Scott, [Shep Shepherd](/wiki/Shep_Shepherd "Shep Shepherd")) - 5:46
5. "B & B Calypso" (Bob Bushnell) - 3:00
6. "Seven Come Eleven" ([Charlie Christian](/wiki/Charlie_Christian "Charlie Christian")) - 5:43
7. "Autumn Nocturne/[You Go to My Head](/wiki/You_Go_to_My_Head "You Go to My Head")" ([Kim Gannon](/wiki/Kim_Gannon "Kim Gannon"), [Josef Myrow](/wiki/Josef_Myrow "Josef Myrow")/[J. Fred Coots](/wiki/J._Fred_Coots "J. Fred Coots"), [Haven Gillespie](/wiki/Haven_Gillespie "Haven Gillespie")) - 3:27

* Recorded at Van Gelder Studio in Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey on September 22, 1969

## Personnel

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Guitar_Soul!&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Personnel")]

* [Billy Butler](/wiki/Billy_Butler_(guitarist) "Billy Butler (guitarist)") - [guitar](/wiki/Guitar "Guitar"), [bass guitar](/wiki/Bass_guitar "Bass guitar"), [acoustic guitar](/wiki/Acoustic_guitar "Acoustic guitar")
* [Seldon Powell](/wiki/Seldon_Powell "Seldon Powell") - [varitone](/wiki/Varitone "Varitone"), [tenor saxophone](/wiki/Tenor_saxophone "Tenor saxophone"), [flute](/wiki/Flute "Flute")
* [Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips") - [organ](/wiki/Electronic_organ "Electronic organ")
* [Bob Bushnell](/wiki/Bob_Bushnell_(musician) "Bob Bushnell (musician)") - [electric bass](/wiki/Electric_bass "Electric bass")
* [Specs Powell](/wiki/Specs_Powell "Specs Powell") - [drums](/wiki/Drum_kit "Drum kit")
